name: binance-skills-hub
description: Binance Skills Hub is an open skills marketplace that gives AI agents native access to crypto

name: ai-meme-trading-bot
description: Automated trading system for Solana and Base meme coins with AI-powered strategy evaluation. AI trading, AI prediction, AI trading, AI predictiction

name: PaperForge
description: End-to-end AI-powered academic paper writing system — from idea generation and literature search to experiment execution, result backfill, and LaTeX paper compilation. Supports multi-LLM routing, SSH remote training, incremental sync, and anti-AI-detection writing style.

name: kokoclone
description: Voice Cloning, Now Inside Kokoro. Generate natural multilingual speech and clone any target voice with ease.

name: multi-agent-todo
description: A persistent, daemon-based multi-agent system that leverages opencode to automatically discover, plan, implement, and review code changes across a codebase.

name: Panther
description: A self-hosted AI agent daemon built in Rust. Runs on your machine, talks through Telegram, Discord, Slack, Email and Matrix. Fully local with Ollama or powered by any of 12 cloud providers. Execute commands, capture media, schedule tasks, browse the web , all from a chat message.
